nasb.text: Joseph commanded his servants the physicians to embalm his father. So the physicians embalmed Israel.

esv.text: And Joseph commanded his servants the physicians to embalm his father. So the physicians embalmed Israel.

cnv.text: 約瑟吩咐臣僕中作醫生的，用香料包殮了他的父親。他們就用香料包殮了以色列。

ccb.text: 然后吩咐医生用香料保存父亲的遗体。医生遵命而行，

csbs.text: 约瑟吩咐仆人中作医生的，用香料包殓他的父亲。他们就用香料包殓了以色列。
